journal_entry: Wrote a letter to J Martin one to C.C. Burrill out wind finished mowing
wind_clause: wind finished mowing
before_wind_clause: Wrote a letter to J Martin one to C.C. Burrill out wind

journal_entry: The wind all around the compass very moderate Left Deer Isle for Rockland arrived in Rockland at 9 P.M.
wind_clause: wind all around the compass very moderate Left Deer Isle for Rockland arrived in Rockland at 9 P.

journal_entry: The wind very moderate very light snow made pump box for James Stevens
wind_clause: wind very moderate very light snow made pump box for James Stevens

journal_entry: The wind very moderate or calm work in shop on boat. Recd letter from Thomas Bunker Cranberry Isles
wind_clause: wind very moderate or calm work in shop on boat.

journal_entry: The wind around compass wrote letter to Henry Geyer James H. Gregory worked in forenoon. on A. G. Brooks mainsail in afternoon roping Jib topsail for my self
wind_clause: wind around compass wrote letter to Henry Geyer James H.

journal_entry: The wind very moderate in forenoon fresh breeze in afternoon could not go to loading and walked home. Recd letter from Benj. Kittridge
wind_clause: wind very moderate in forenoon fresh breeze in afternoon could not go to loading and walked home. Recd letter from Benj.

journal_entry: The wind very moderate commenced making boxes for the Wind mill went to Lodge of Good Templars.
wind_clause: wind very moderate commenced making boxes for the Wind mill went to Lodge of Good Templars.

journal_entry: The wind very moderate and warm rainy in the afternoon paid bills against the Estate of Benj. Rand
wind_clause: wind very moderate and warm rainy in the afternoon paid bills against the Estate of Benj.

journal_entry: very moderate all day the wind out in the afternoon hauled the Amulet from C. Stevens wharf to L. B. Tracy's blocks had wood hauld home from A. B. Newman very warm.
wind_clause: wind out in the afternoon hauled the Amulet from C.
before_wind_clause: very moderate all day the wind

journal_entry: finished flying jibboom in forenoon and carried it on board The wind out foggy
wind_clause: wind out foggy
before_wind_clause: finished flying jibboom in forenoon and carried it on board The wind

journal_entry: The wind very moderate and variable. and hot commenced loading apart out of the water and a part off the wharf. the wind came of at night with a squall with Thunder and heavy rain.
wind_clause: wind very moderate and variable. and hot commenced loading apart out of the water and a part off the wharf.

journal_entry: The wind blowing down river work loading filled the hold at noon and commenced pulling the deck load on.
wind_clause: wind blowing down river work loading filled the hold at noon and commenced pulling the deck load on.

journal_entry: The wind very moderate blowing up river
wind_clause: wind very moderate blowing up river

journal_entry: The wind very moderate and faffling took the tow at day light. to go down river.
wind_clause: wind very moderate and faffling took the tow at day light.

journal_entry: very moderate all day overcast and in the afternoon foggy sounded in 10 fathoms water. wind variable took in light sails and headed of shore
wind_clause: wind variable took in light sails and headed of shore
before_wind_clause: very moderate all day overcast and in the afternoon foggy sounded in 10 fathoms water. wind

journal_entry: The wind variable and very moderate set all sail except main topmast & mizzen staysails afternoon showery.
wind_clause: wind variable and very moderate set all sail except main topmast & mizzen staysails afternoon showery.

journal_entry: The wind very moderate and baffling all day Getting ready for Sea
wind_clause: wind very moderate and baffling all day Getting ready for Sea

journal_entry: The wind baffling all day took in studding sail very warm and light winds Latitude 23° 30 Longitude 32° 30
wind_clause: wind baffling all day took in studding sail very warm and light winds Latitude 23° 30 Longitude 32° 30

journal_entry: Very moderate took in studding sails wind baffling at 4 PM set the studding sail Latitude 30° 05 Longitude 65° 47
wind_clause: wind baffling at 4 PM set the studding sail Latitude 30° 05 Longitude 65° 47
before_wind_clause: Very moderate took in studding sails wind

journal_entry: The wind very moderate and baffling all day. showery in afternoon got good observations Lat at Noon 22° 33 Longitude noon 70° 20
wind_clause: wind very moderate and baffling all day.

journal_entry: The wind very moderate and baffling In Turks Island Passage borind Utrough to Cape Haiti St-Domingo Lat 21° 08 Long 71° 28
wind_clause: wind very moderate and baffling In Turks Island Passage borind Utrough to Cape Haiti St-Domingo Lat 21° 08 Long 71° 28

journal_entry: The wind variable commenced to discharge Cargo . m Lighters
wind_clause: wind variable commenced to discharge Cargo .

journal_entry: The wind very moderate and changable very hot Finished onloading. wrote letter home
wind_clause: wind very moderate and changable very hot Finished onloading.

journal_entry: Calm in morning afternoon wind blowing could not get out
wind_clause: wind blowing could not get out

journal_entry: Wind variable Set up head gear and made new main boom topen lift
wind_clause: Wind variable Set up head gear and made new main boom topen lift

journal_entry: The wind variable wrote letter home
wind_clause: wind variable wrote letter home

journal_entry: The wind out and foggy. work all day on T.H. Smallidge barn
wind_clause: wind out and foggy.

journal_entry: The wind out. and in the afternoon rainy. Turned out bed posts for D Brickford
wind_clause: wind out.

journal_entry: The wind Baffling all day and very warm making seats for the Hall
wind_clause: wind Baffling all day and very warm making seats for the Hall

journal_entry: The wind variable all day weather hot and heavy rain squalls went back to Stave Island and went on board the Sea Flower
wind_clause: wind variable all day weather hot and heavy rain squalls went back to Stave Island and went on board the Sea Flower

journal_entry: The wind baffling went to Prospect Harbor early in the morning to hire money. Hired $100. of H D Cearmts back at 9 o'clock. went on board of the Sea Flower and went out for Rockland anchored at Cranberry Isles at dark.
wind_clause: wind baffling went to Prospect Harbor early in the morning to hire money.

journal_entry: Calm in morning and clear. After the dew dried up. helped J.F. Kingsley open hay. The wind breezed up. Southerly In the afternoon help haul in hay.
wind_clause: wind breezed up.
before_wind_clause: Calm in morning and clear. After the dew dried up. helped J.F. Kingsley open hay. The wind

journal_entry: The wind Baffleing or Calm all day and the Thermometer 55 degrees Went to Steuben to see abt getting lumber and to Millbridge to see R. Fickett & sons Came back at night
wind_clause: wind Baffleing or Calm all day and the Thermometer 55 degrees Went to Steuben to see abt getting lumber and to Millbridge to see R.

journal_entry: The wind very moderate all day. Thermometer 58° Work on platform around house Recd letters from E.A. Baker Springfield Republican Cambridge Cronicle Boston Courier L.S. Tripp of Surry and from American Office
wind_clause: wind very moderate all day.

journal_entry: The wind baffling and moderate all day. Thermometer 52 degrees Wrote letter to American Office work all day on house. on water closet.
wind_clause: wind baffling and moderate all day.

journal_entry: The wind fresh breeze and heavy rain all day Thermometer 48 degrees
wind_clause: wind fresh breeze and heavy rain all day Thermometer 48 degrees

journal_entry: The wind moderate all day Thermometer 70 had 11 people in one party from the Rodick House to dinner.
wind_clause: wind moderate all day Thermometer 70 had 11 people in one party from the Rodick House to dinner.

journal_entry: Very moderate all day with an air of wind all around the compass The Thermometer 73 above bought one ton of hay of J.T. Kingsley and hauled it home. Helped Colen Pendleton on his dora to make tight
wind_clause: wind all around the compass The Thermometer 73 above bought one ton of hay of J.
before_wind_clause: Very moderate all day with an air of wind

journal_entry: The wind all around the Compass. and overcast. at night showery Thermometer 45 Work all day for Wm Guptill on house
wind_clause: wind all around the Compass. and overcast.

journal_entry: The wind Baffling and calm all day Went to Milbridge to the Masonic burial of Capt I Sawyer & wife who perished in the rigging at Barnegat. N.J. Came back home at 7 P.M. The sleighing good moderate rain in evening
wind_clause: wind Baffling and calm all day Went to Milbridge to the Masonic burial of Capt I Sawyer & wife who perished in the rigging at Barnegat.

journal_entry: The wind very moderate all day Thermometer 88° Went mackereling and roped a boat sail
wind_clause: wind very moderate all day Thermometer 88° Went mackereling and roped a boat sail

journal_entry: The wind all around the compase and Snowing most all day Thermometer 30 degrees Reed letter from Wm B. Viall
wind_clause: wind all around the compase and Snowing most all day Thermometer 30 degrees Reed letter from Wm B.

journal_entry: The wind very moderate all day. Light snow in the forenoon Thermometer 35 degrees above zero.
wind_clause: wind very moderate all day.

journal_entry: The wind moderate all day baffling. Thermometer 27 above. light snow in the evening. Work all day on harness getting ready to go in the woods
wind_clause: wind moderate all day baffling.

journal_entry: The wind very moderate all day and fine weather went out fishing from home in dora. Thermometer in the afternoon when I came in from fishing 80 degrees. Reed letter from Helen Stevens at Leadsvelle
wind_clause: wind very moderate all day and fine weather went out fishing from home in dora.

journal_entry: Wind very moderate all day. Started in the morning in vessel to go to Franklin to load with wood for Rockland. Not wind enough to get by Grindstone point anchored in sand cove after dark.
wind_clause: Wind very moderate all day.

journal_entry: Anchored in the Sand cove at 2 oclock in the morning. Calm. At 10 AM Wind breezed up. Easterly but did not go out work about home all day.
wind_clause: Wind breezed up.
before_wind_clause: Anchored in the Sand cove at 2 oclock in the morning. Calm. At 10 AM Wind

journal_entry: Moderate wind and rough. When the sun rose was a breast of Duck Island at 8 oclock AM abrest of Backers Island. go in home at 10. AM
wind_clause: wind and rough.

journal_entry: Very moderate wind and baffling at 2 Am fog lifted. saw Gay head bearing S.W run N.E. fog closed in at 3 sighted Tarpaulin Cove Light fog partly lifted. and dead calm Then the flood tide made and carried through the Viney and Sound by East Chop. And where the Ebb tide mad carried us back abrest of Vineyard Haven and then anchored untill 6 P.M. when tideslacked got the boat a head and towed in to Vineyard Haven
wind_clause: wind and baffling at 2 Am fog lifted.

journal_entry: Calm in morning Wind breezed up about 9 oclock moderate. beat out and went up to the Falls but did not get up time nough to get over and anchored below.
wind_clause: Wind breezed up about 9 oclock moderate. beat out and went up to the Falls but did not get up time nough to get over and anchored below.

journal_entry: Calm in forenoon wind came of at night blowing a gale. Work in shop
wind_clause: wind came of at night blowing a gale. Work in shop

journal_entry: Calm most all day at 3 oclock in the afternoon finished loading but not wind Enough to go over the Falls Filled water got bills of Laden & in the evening rainy
wind_clause: wind Enough to go over the Falls Filled water got bills of Laden & in the evening rainy
before_wind_clause: Calm most all day at 3 oclock in the afternoon finished loading but not wind

journal_entry: Wind variable Commenced discharging Chromo in morning of Iron at night it was about two thirds out
wind_clause: Wind variable Commenced discharging Chromo in morning of Iron at night it was about two thirds out

journal_entry: Calm in the morning Got underway and when the wind breezed up went to Sullivan to have some work done on Chromo and to load after the work was done
wind_clause: wind breezed up went to Sullivan to have some work done on Chromo and to load after the work was done
before_wind_clause: Calm in the morning Got underway and when the wind

journal_entry: Calm and thick with fog. in the morning with a thunder shower. Got underway and anchored again at Bass Harbor not wind enough to get out the Harbor
wind_clause: wind enough to get out the Harbor
before_wind_clause: Calm and thick with fog. in the morning with a thunder shower. Got underway and anchored again at Bass Harbor not wind

journal_entry: Calm all the forenoon At noon got underway at Bass Harbor moderate wind. anchored at Sullivan at Sun set thick with fog most all day
wind_clause: wind.
before_wind_clause: Calm all the forenoon At noon got underway at Bass Harbor moderate wind

journal_entry: Wind Thermometer 4 degrees. below zero in the morning but it soon moderated work in shop.
wind_clause: Wind Thermometer 4 degrees. below zero in the morning but it soon moderated work in shop.

journal_entry: Wind Moderate and very warm. recd company all the forenoon. and in the after noon went to a town caucus at the Hall and in the evening went to the Masonic Lodge.
wind_clause: Wind Moderate and very warm.

journal_entry: Wind up River in Philadelphia and very hot Thermometer 94 in shade. Commenced to discharge stone at Norris Street wharf Got a coal order to load the third time for M C Mailing KennebunckPort. From H D Brighttnes 242. So 3d shutPhilada freight the same as the other two times which is $125 and discharged Thermometer 100°
wind_clause: Wind up River in Philadelphia and very hot Thermometer 94 in shade. Commenced to discharge stone at Norris Street wharf Got a coal order to load the third time for M C Mailing KennebunckPort.

journal_entry: Wind variable with rain squalls Commenced work caulking Chromo in morning with four men and had three carpenters to do other work making hatch combings Ice
wind_clause: Wind variable with rain squalls Commenced work caulking Chromo in morning with four men and had three carpenters to do other work making hatch combings Ice

journal_entry: Nearly calm all day. sometimes only wind enough to steer Anchored at City Island at dark
wind_clause: wind enough to steer Anchored at City Island at dark
before_wind_clause: Nearly calm all day. sometimes only wind

journal_entry: Wind on the western board. but drizzling rain most all day Have not commenced discharging yet. Are waiting for a Canal boat to discharge Chartered the Chromo myself without any help of a Broken to load coal for Salem Mass. Consigned to C. S. Clark freight $1.10 and discharged
wind_clause: Wind on the western board.

journal_entry: Very moderate baffling wind and thick with fog in the morning to thick to go down River Bought a lot of Cedar boat boards of C.H. Mc Cumber for $25.00. paid $5. down. and took the boards on board the Chromo to carry home for my own use. in the afternoon worked down to Burrying Island
wind_clause: wind and thick with fog in the morning to thick to go down River Bought a lot of Cedar boat boards of C.

journal_entry: About calm all day now wind enough to get underway Chromo at Winter Harbor
wind_clause: wind enough to get underway Chromo at Winter Harbor
before_wind_clause: About calm all day now wind

journal_entry: Wind all around the compass cloudy and misty hired A.G. Gervish $200 payable in one and two years at 7 percent
wind_clause: Wind all around the compass cloudy and misty hired A.

journal_entry: Wind very moderate not enough to tell which way it is. Went out of doors and to the Harbor the frist time since I was sick Put teams on to haul stone for the new Church as directed by D.B. Filmit of Boston
wind_clause: Wind very moderate not enough to tell which way it is. Went out of doors and to the Harbor the frist time since I was sick Put teams on to haul stone for the new Church as directed by D.

journal_entry: Wind all kinds always with showers. Met at the Hotel beacon to see abt having a wharf built to tide waters the notice given by the select men of which I am chairman
wind_clause: Wind all kinds always with showers. Met at the Hotel beacon to see abt having a wharf built to tide waters the notice given by the select men of which I am chairman

journal_entry: Wind baffling with no clear of at all hauled coal for the Str Silver Star
wind_clause: Wind baffling with no clear of at all hauled coal for the Str Silver Star

journal_entry: Very moderate and fine weather Work all day making town report. with the help of F. P. Joy one of the Selection to be read was 4th At night the Silver Star arrived after being ashore on sunk there repaired guns fire in honor. No wind or same as none
wind_clause: wind or same as none
before_wind_clause: Very moderate and fine weather Work all day making town report. with the help of F. P. Joy one of the Selection to be read was 4th At night the Silver Star arrived after being ashore on sunk there repaired guns fire in honor. No wind

journal_entry: Wind all around the Compass and overcast. Lying at Portmouth Ordered 4 Bbls of Naphtha Oil Company Boston but shall not get it untill tomorrow
wind_clause: Wind all around the Compass and overcast.

journal_entry: Wind all around the Compass. Thunder shower and sunshine. Commenced repairing boat that had been runto by Steam yacht. Now then
wind_clause: Wind all around the Compass. Thunder shower and sunshine. Commenced repairing boat that had been runto by Steam yacht.

journal_entry: About calm all day. sometimes a little wind one way then another Took the top of my wharf of to repair it
wind_clause: wind one way then another Took the top of my wharf of to repair it
before_wind_clause: About calm all day. sometimes a little wind

journal_entry: Wind all around the compass but on the whole, a very fair day Work at the coal shed
wind_clause: Wind all around the compass but on the whole, a very fair day Work at the coal shed

journal_entry: Very moderate wind all around the compass and looking like rain. Went to the Marsh to Uncle C.Y. Bunkers House. in forenoon and stoped untill after supper. then came home my wife accompanied me
wind_clause: wind all around the compass and looking like rain. Went to the Marsh to Uncle C.

journal_entry: Nearly calm all day When there was any wind it was out and showery
wind_clause: wind it was out and showery
before_wind_clause: Nearly calm all day When there was any wind

journal_entry: Wind Up River Still at Bangor. Babbitted the bearings of shaft in Bangor. and commenced putting machinery back in to Boat. Myself being only a helper
wind_clause: Wind Up River Still at Bangor.

journal_entry: Wind Up River. helping put the machinery back into Str M. & M. from the shop in Bangor
wind_clause: Wind Up River.

journal_entry: Wind variable and very unsteady. Thunder & lightning in forenoon also showery which continued at internals during the day and evening Such days as these are injurious to most all business and especially running a steam boat in the bay
wind_clause: Wind variable and very unsteady.

journal_entry: Wind all around the compass with snow and rain. Made the trip over the bay in forenoon. but in the afternoon only got to Bar Harbor & back to Winter Harbor. Sent check to New York to H B Rawson & Ce for $767.83 it being the amt of Invoice of cargo of coal of Sch Henry
wind_clause: Wind all around the compass with snow and rain. Made the trip over the bay in forenoon. but in the afternoon only got to Bar Harbor & back to Winter Harbor.

journal_entry: Wind very moderate or none in the morning. later it breezed moderate Southerly. Do not go out to day though I do not have any chills. Dr Larrabee called to see me
wind_clause: Wind very moderate or none in the morning.

journal_entry: Wind moderate or none at all and overcast. Am getting better and in the afternoon went over to Jennie Kingsleys In the evening rainy
wind_clause: Wind moderate or none at all and overcast.

journal_entry: Wind calm in morning and wet. Ther. 42' and little rainy all day Stay in the store of which I am directly interested. having bought out hald interest of K.S. Macteer I am also working for my election for Chairman of the board of Selectmen
wind_clause: Wind calm in morning and wet.

journal_entry: Wind moderate or calm with fog in morning
wind_clause: Wind moderate or calm with fog in morning

journal_entry: Calm about all day Tried to get to Bar Harbor in Sail Yacht. but not wind enough. and got home at dark towing apart of the way. There is no snow on the ground nor has there been any sleighing so far this winter. I am keeping store for my self selling groceries. Have been in the business a year
wind_clause: wind enough.
before_wind_clause: Calm about all day Tried to get to Bar Harbor in Sail Yacht. but not wind

journal_entry: Wind very moderate or calm. not enough in one direction to tell which way it is. staid in store
wind_clause: Wind very moderate or calm.

journal_entry: Wind very moderate all day. in fact it has been calm Staying in store
wind_clause: Wind very moderate all day.
